UserPromptSubmit.description: Verify switchboard CLI is available and reactor is reachable before running vault skills
UserPromptSubmit.command: which switchboard >/dev/null 2>&1 && switchboard ping 2>&1 | head -1 || echo 'WARNING: switchboard CLI not found or reactor not reachable. Install: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/liberuum/switchboard-cli/main/install.sh | bash'

UserPromptSubmit.description: Auto-introspect if cache is stale (ensures bai/* models are available)
UserPromptSubmit.command: switchboard models list --format json 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'bai/' || switchboard introspect 2>&1

UserPromptSubmit.description: Find the knowledge-vault drive and export its ID for skills to use
UserPromptSubmit.command: DRIVE_ID=$(switchboard drives list --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print(d['id']) for d in json.load(sys.stdin) if d.get('slug')=='knowledge-vault' or 'knowledge' in d.get('name','').lower()]" 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$DRIVE_ID" ]; then echo "KNOWLEDGE_VAULT_DRIVE=$DRIVE_ID"; echo "Use: switchboard docs tree $DRIVE_ID --format json to get folder structure"; else echo 'WARNING: No knowledge-vault drive found. Create one: switchboard drives create --name "Knowledge Vault" --preferred-editor knowledge-vault'; fi
